name: Shelkopolis

ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Amber Fountain Innkeeper is the locality-facing innkeeper interface in Shelkopolis, useful for provides lodging, local gossip, traveler warnings, and emergency favors.
Threads of Twilight Market Clerk is the locality-facing market clerk interface in Shelkopolis, useful for manages queues, forms, stall assignments, and the practical memory of who came through.
Aurora Light Cathedral Attendant is the locality-facing shrine attendant interface in Shelkopolis, useful for maintains offerings, notices breaches, and guides minor local rites.
Shelkopolis Porter is the locality-facing porter interface in Shelkopolis, useful for moves freight, luggage, and urgent loads while absorbing gossip from thresholds, yards, and lanes.
Shelkopolis Scribe is the locality-facing scribe interface in Shelkopolis, useful for records transactions, testimony, obligations, and quiet corrections that later decide public outcomes.
Shelkopolis Labor Foreman is the locality-facing labor foreman interface in Shelkopolis, useful for coordinates shifts, crews, protection, and blame when practical work goes wrong.

street_level_faction_presence.what_they_look_like_in_practice: Authority appears through uniforms, seals, ledgers, ritual markers, escorts, tools, queue control, and which people others make way for.
street_level_faction_presence.who_benefits: Those who know the rules, fulfill obligations, or ride aligned patronage tend to benefit first.
street_level_faction_presence.who_fears_them: Debtors, irregular operators, exposed workers, and those with fragile standing often fear enforcement or scrutiny most.

greetings: Measured compliments on attire are normal among strangers of equal standing.
Road-facing greetings are brisk and practical when commerce is moving.
hospitality_rules: Guests are welcomed with ordered seating, textiles, tea, or polished refreshment rather than loud abundance.
taboo_topics: publicly humiliating a host over dress or refinement
faith_etiquette: woven offerings and quiet prayer conduct near shrines to Cysur, Cyfoes, Felujitas, and Felelem
suspicious_behavior: lingering near route offices without business
moving through elite districts in obvious disguise
outsider_mistakes: assuming fashion is superficial rather than civic and political

ordinary_life_surface.what_people_do_all_day: Daily life turns on tailoring, road policing, market exchange, scholarly browsing, and layered public performance where refinement and utility are expected to coexist.
ordinary_life_surface.what_places_feel_like: Markets smell of dyes, pressed flowers, wool, metal polish, and cooked street food. Roads carry bells, hooves, clipped commands, and bright plume movement. Shrines feel orderly rather than ecstatic.
ordinary_life_surface.home_and_guest_norms: Homes emphasize layered fabrics, practical beauty, controlled guest spaces, and private corners for prayer or contemplation.

public_rumors: People say something in Shelkopolis has grown more tense than the officials admit.
Merchants claim the last busy cycle in Shelkopolis left someone unpaid or publicly embarrassed.
half_true_rumors: A respected local figure in Shelkopolis is said to be protecting someone they should have exposed.
faction_planted_rumors: A faction-friendly story in Shelkopolis insists that harsher oversight is the only thing keeping things from collapse.
religious_warnings: Some locals in Shelkopolis treat current unease as a warning rather than ordinary trouble.
trade_concerns: Freight, labor, or supply movement around Shelkopolis is said to be more fragile than the ledgers suggest.
criminal_whispers: Quiet talk in Shelkopolis says favors can still be bought if one knows who keeps the informal door open.
historical_misconceptions: Older residents of Shelkopolis repeat a version of local history that does not fully match corrective or official accounts.

contradiction_aware_myth_versions.claim: Older residents of Shelkopolis repeat a version of local history that does not fully match corrective or official accounts.

travel_and_transition_texture.feel: Travel into Shelk is marked by visible route order, bright patrol signs, and the expectation that papers, cargo, and dress will be noticed.
travel_and_transition_texture.checkpoint_behavior: Checkpoint, gate, dock, or entry custom reveals who is trusted, who is processed, and who is delayed.
travel_and_transition_texture.caravan_or_route_custom: Route handoff norms matter; escorts, seals, witnesses, or weather-reading often determine who moves next.
travel_and_transition_texture.regional_handoff_custom: Responsibility for travelers and goods visibly changes at territorial boundaries.

text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.where_strangers_gather: At the most practical public node: inn bench, queue court, market edge, dock gate, shrine steps, or freight lane.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.public_notice_drawing_attention: A new notice in Shelkopolis is drawing comment because it changes someone’s movement, cost, or safety.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.visible_tension: People in Shelkopolis are acting as though a pressure everyone knows about has become harder to ignore.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.private_trouble: Someone respectable in Shelkopolis is privately entangled in an obligation they cannot publicly explain.
text_rpg_ready_locality_hooks.one_hour_entanglement: A newcomer in Shelkopolis could be pulled into a dispute, delivery problem, witness request, or rumor test within an hour of arrival.

relationship_and_reputation_consequences.trust: People are remembered for finish, grace under pressure, reliability in trade, and whether they embarrass others publicly.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_good_memory: Keeping one’s word under visible pressure, showing correct public respect, and not creating avoidable trouble.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_causes_bad_memory: Public embarrassment, broken obligations, opportunism during crisis, and forcing others to absorb avoidable risk.
relationship_and_reputation_consequences.what_favors_matter: Timely introductions, queue priority, sealed testimony, repair help, escorting, storage, ritual guidance, and quiet omission when deserved.

scene_starter_inventory: overheard dispute at a public threshold
missing person or missing ledger concern
faction test of loyalty or usefulness
strange celestial sign interpreted three different ways
